commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers combine a security fix, an endpoint compatibility decision, and contributor-owned real behavior proof.; Needs attention: The PR is security-sensitive and still leaves a concrete credential-routing bypass in the new endpoint validator.; Review finding: [P1] Validate encoded hosts before suffix matching — Sources/CodexBarCore/ProviderEndpointOverrideValidat... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared endpoint override validator and routes MiniMax plus Alibaba Coding Plan host/full-URL overrides through HTTPS, no-userinfo, provider-domain allowlists with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. From source inspection, a host containing an encoded delimiter can be decoded before suffix matching and then returned to downstream URL builders as a host override.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers combine a security fix, an endpoint compatibility decision, and contributor-owned real behavior proof.

target.title: [security] fix(providers): validate sibling endpoint overrides
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a shared provider endpoint override validator for sibling usage providers.
- Restrict MiniMax and Alibaba endpoint overrides to their expected provider domains.
- Reject non-HTTPS schemes and embedded userinfo for host/URL overrides before credentials are attached to follow-up requests.
- Add focused regression coverage for rejected attacker hosts, rejected `http://` overrides, rejected `user:pass@` URLs, and accepted provider-owned HTTPS/bare host overrides.

## Compatibility note
This intentionally treats explicit `http://...` endpoint overrides as invalid, even for otherwise provider-owned hosts. These settings carry cookies or API credentials into provider requests, so preserving insecure HTTP compatibility would keep a credential-disclosure footgun. Bare host overrides such as `platform.minimaxi.com` and provider HTTPS URLs remain supported; callers that need a custom endpoint should use HTTPS.

## Validation
- `swift build --target CodexBarCore` — passed.
- Focused smoke harness compiled the touched validator/settings readers with `swiftc` and exercised MiniMax + Alibaba allowlist/rejection paths — passed with `endpoint override smoke checks passed`.
- `git diff --check` — passed.
- `swift test --filter 'MiniMaxEndpointOverrideSettingsTests|AlibabaCodingPlanSettingsReaderTests'` — blocked before the focused tests by the existing local `KeyboardShortcuts`/SwiftUI `#Preview` macro toolchain issue (`PreviewsMacros` plugin not found).
target.author: hinotoi-agent
